site.title: Quest4You - Discover Yourself! | Self-Discovery & Compatibility Quizzes
site.description: Self-discovery quizzes about sexuality, fetishes and compatibility. Find out who you are and connect with compatible people. 100% free and anonymous.

banner.experimentalDesc: This platform is in testing phase. Some features may be under development.

vanilla.cat_0_desc: You prefer soft, romantic, and traditional intimacy

orientation.cat_0_desc: Clear and exclusive attraction to the opposite gender
orientation.cat_1_desc: Predominantly straight with some curiosity or openness
orientation.cat_2_desc: Attraction to multiple genders, fluid and open
orientation.cat_3_desc: Predominantly attracted to the same gender with some flexibility
orientation.cat_4_desc: Defined attraction to the same gender
orientation.q1: How do you define yourself in terms of sexual orientation?
orientation.q2: Have you ever felt romantic or sexual attraction to someone of the same gender?
orientation.q2_o1: 🤔 Maybe once, but I'm not sure
orientation.q3: Have you had any intimate experience (kissing, touching, sex) with someone of the same gender?
orientation.q4: When you see attractive people in public or media, who are you most attracted to?
orientation.q4_o1: ↗️ Mostly opposite gender, occasionally same gender
orientation.q4_o3: ↘️ Mostly same gender, occasionally opposite gender
orientation.q5: In your sexual fantasies, who appears most often?
orientation.q5_o0: 👫 Only people of the opposite gender
orientation.q5_o4: 🌈 Only people of the same gender
orientation.q6: If you could experiment with someone of the same gender without judgment, how would you react?
orientation.q6_o0: ❌ I wouldn't be interested at all
orientation.q6_o4: 🔥 It's something I already do/want to do
orientation.q7: When you think about having a serious romantic relationship, who do you imagine yourself with?
orientation.q7_o1: ↗️ Probably opposite gender, but I don't rule out others
orientation.q7_o2: 💜 Any gender, depends on the person
orientation.q7_o3: ↘️ Probably same gender, but I don't rule out others
orientation.q8: How do you feel about erotic/pornographic content with people of the same gender?
orientation.q9: If an attractive friend of the same gender showed interest in you, how would you react?
orientation.q9_o1: 🤔 I'd be confused but probably decline
orientation.q9_o2: 👀 I'd be curious and might consider it
orientation.q10: Throughout your life, your attraction to different genders has:
orientation.q10_o0: 🪨 Always been only for the opposite gender
orientation.q10_o1: ↗️ Mostly opposite gender, with moments of curiosity
orientation.q10_o3: ↘️ Mostly same gender, with some exceptions
orientation.q10_o4: 🌈 Always been only for the same gender
orientation.q11: How do you feel about kissing someone of the same gender?
orientation.q11_o1: 🤔 Not something I seek, but it wouldn't bother me
orientation.q12: Do you feel attraction to trans or non-binary people?
orientation.q12_o4: 💜 Yes, gender isn't relevant to me
orientation.q13: If you had to choose a dating app, which would you choose?
orientation.q13_o0: 👫 Heterosexual apps (Tinder hetero mode, Bumble, etc.)
orientation.q13_o1: 🔄 Apps that let you see all genders
orientation.q14: On a Kinsey scale (0 = exclusively hetero, 6 = exclusively homo), where do you place yourself?
orientation.q14_o2: 2️⃣ Predominantly hetero, more than incidentally homo
orientation.q14_o4: 4️⃣ Predominantly homo, more than incidentally hetero
orientation.q15: Which phrase best describes your current situation?
orientation.q15_o0: ⚤ I'm heterosexual and sure about it
orientation.q15_o1: ↗️ I'm mostly straight but have some curiosity
orientation.q15_o2: 💜 I feel attraction to more than one gender
orientation.q15_o3: ↘️ I'm mostly gay/lesbian but have some flexibility
orientation.q15_o4: 🌈 I'm homosexual and sure about it
